content.text:
usage: bind_telegram_group.py [-h] --project-url PROJECT_URL --group-id
                              GROUP_ID --name NAME [--group-name GROUP_NAME]
                              [--card-prefix CARD_PREFIX]
                              [--dry-run | --apply] [--skip-restart]
                              [--skip-db] [--skip-openclaw]

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --project-url PROJECT_URL
                        Canonical project URL (must exist in DB)
  --group-id GROUP_ID
  --name NAME           Human display name for the systemPrompt
  --group-name GROUP_NAME
                        Optional Telegram group label for DB
  --card-prefix CARD_PREFIX
                        Optional card label prefix
  --dry-run             Print the patch, write nothing (default)
  --apply               Write openclaw.json + DB, backup first, restart
                        gateway
  --skip-restart        With --apply: write config but skip gateway restart
  --skip-db             With --apply: patch openclaw.json only (do not update
                        projects table)
  --skip-openclaw       With --apply: update DB only (no openclaw.json patch;
                        DB-driven plugin scope)
